PG5.template: Yesterday I was at (insert location) when I noticed something (insert adjective).
PG5.text: A business owner messages a Chinese supplier on WhatsApp. Pay by Visa?

PG5.template: (insert item) (insert fact), (insert complete opposite item) (insert similar fact).
PG5.text: Importers think suppliers are gaslighting them. They're not. Cards just don't fit.

PG5.template: Are you still (insert action)? I've got (insert result) in (insert time frame) and I have never (insert action).
PG5.text: Are importers still asking every supplier the same Visa question? Stop.

PG5.template: What (insert title) says vs what they mean.
PG5.text: What the Chinese supplier says on WhatsApp vs what they actually mean.

PG5.template: If you are anything like me, you take your (insert event/item) very seriously.
PG5.text: If a business owner takes supplier payments seriously, this conversation lands.

PG5.template: In this video: what (insert audience) actually mean when (insert action), explained.
PG5.text: In this video: what Chinese suppliers actually mean when they refuse a card on WhatsApp, explained.

Picture this. We see it every week. You're sourcing from China. You message your supplier on WhatsApp. Hey, can I pay by Visa? They say no. You ask another supplier. Same answer. You're getting suspicious.
